---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: "[bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots or paste relevant log output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS, Ubuntu, Windows]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- Role: [e.g. Student, Teacher, Admin]
- Deployment: [e.g. Local Docker, EC2]

## Additional context

Any other context about the problem.
